title: Microsoft's EU Monopoly: Why Claude ISN'T on Teams! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof raises questions about why Claude is not integrated into Microsoft Teams, suggesting Microsoft's strong EU market position and development of its own Copilot AI may be factors in the decision.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof asks why Anthropic's Claude is not integrated into Microsoft Teams. It points to Microsoft's strong EU market position and its development of its own Copilot AI as possible reasons for keeping a competing model off the platform. The takeaway is that platform integration decisions can reflect commercial and competitive interests, not just technical fit.
